Retrieve ICD codes for hypertension

Source: R/conditions.R
get_htn_codes.Rd

Returns code sets from the hypertension CodeSpec (spec_htn). Two versions are available:

  • Version 1 (without medication): diagnosis codes only.

  • Version 2 (with medication): same codes; the additional medication criterion is captured in get_htn_defs(version = 2).

Usage

get_htn_codes(
  version = "latest",
  code_type = NULL,
  variable_type = c("condition", "outcome"),
  periods = FALSE,
  format = c("list", "tibble")
)

Arguments

version

Version to use. "latest" (default) returns the highest-numbered version. Pass an integer (e.g., 1) or a key string (e.g., "v1") to select a specific version.

code_type

Optional character vector of code types to return. Valid values: "dx_icd9", "dx_icd10", "proc_icd9", "proc_icd10", "hcpcs", "cpt", "rev". NULL (default) returns all code types.

variable_type

"condition" (default) or "outcome". Hypertension is defined as a condition only; "outcome" returns empty code sets.

periods

Logical. FALSE (default) returns short-format codes (e.g., "4010"). TRUE returns decimal-format codes (e.g., "401.0").

format

"list" (default) returns a named list of character vectors keyed by {code_type}_{encounter}. "tibble" returns a long-form tibble with columns key, code, abbreviated, code_type, encounter, variable_type, and version.

Value

Named list or tibble of codes.

See also

get_htn_defs() for the narrative algorithm description.

Examples

# All ICD codes for the latest version
get_htn_codes()
#> $dx_icd9
#>  [1] "401"   "4010"  "4011"  "4019"  "4030"  "40300" "40301" "4031"  "40310"
#> [10] "40311" "4039"  "40390" "40391"
#> 
#> $dx_icd10
#> [1] "I10"  "I120" "I129" "I16"  "I160" "I161" "I169"
#> 

# ICD-10 codes only, with decimal periods
get_htn_codes(code_type = "dx_icd10", periods = TRUE)
#> $dx_icd10
#> [1] "I10"   "I12.0" "I12.9" "I16"   "I16.0" "I16.1" "I16.9"
#> 

# As a tibble
get_htn_codes(format = "tibble")
#> # A tibble: 20 × 4
#>    code_type code  variable_type version
#>    <chr>     <chr> <chr>         <chr>  
#>  1 dx_icd9   401   condition     v2     
#>  2 dx_icd9   4010  condition     v2     
#>  3 dx_icd9   4011  condition     v2     
#>  4 dx_icd9   4019  condition     v2     
#>  5 dx_icd9   4030  condition     v2     
#>  6 dx_icd9   40300 condition     v2     
#>  7 dx_icd9   40301 condition     v2     
#>  8 dx_icd9   4031  condition     v2     
#>  9 dx_icd9   40310 condition     v2     
#> 10 dx_icd9   40311 condition     v2     
#> 11 dx_icd9   4039  condition     v2     
#> 12 dx_icd9   40390 condition     v2     
#> 13 dx_icd9   40391 condition     v2     
#> 14 dx_icd10  I10   condition     v2     
#> 15 dx_icd10  I120  condition     v2     
#> 16 dx_icd10  I129  condition     v2     
#> 17 dx_icd10  I16   condition     v2     
#> 18 dx_icd10  I160  condition     v2     
#> 19 dx_icd10  I161  condition     v2     
#> 20 dx_icd10  I169  condition     v2
